content.hint: 表达感谢时，常用 'appreciate the opportunity to' + 动作，强调对面试机会的重视
content.situation: 面试官表示面试结束，感谢你的参与，你希望礼貌回应并表达对机会的珍惜
content.speakerText: Thank you for coming in today. We'll let you know our decision soon.
content.speakerTextCn: 感谢你今天前来面试，我们会尽快通知你结果。
content.responseTemplate: I really appreciate the opportunity to ______.

content.hint: 表达期待时，'excited about the possibility' 是自然且积极的表达，比 'interested' 更有情感温度
content.situation: 面试即将结束，你希望表达感谢并传递积极期待，但不显得过于急切
content.speakerText: That's all for today. We're impressed with your background.
content.speakerTextCn: 今天就到这里，我们对你的背景印象深刻。
content.knowledgePoint: 积极情感词的恰当使用
content.responseTemplate: Thank you so much. I'm very ______ about the possibility of joining your team.

content.hint: 面试场景中，用 'insightful questions' 赞美对方的提问，既专业又体现尊重
content.situation: 面试官说‘我们今天聊得很愉快’，你希望礼貌结束对话并再次感谢对方的时间
content.speakerText: I really enjoyed our conversation today.
content.speakerTextCn: 我今天和你的交谈非常愉快。
content.knowledgePoint: 对面试官的精准赞美与致谢
content.responseTemplate: Thank you for your time and ______.

content.hint: 表达感谢时，常用 'this opportunity' 指代面试机会
content.template: Thank you so much for this ___—I'm truly honored and excited to hear back!
content.knowledgePoint: 固定表达：this opportunity（表达感谢的核心搭配）

content.hint: 面试中提到未列入的成就，通常指未写在什么文件上？
content.template: Actually, yes—I recently won a local innovation award that wasn't on my ___.
content.knowledgePoint: 核心词汇：resume（简历，面试场景高频词）

content.hint: 面试结束时，最常感谢的是对方的什么？
content.template: I really appreciate your ___ and the chance to learn more about your company.
content.knowledgePoint: 惯用搭配：appreciate your time（表达感谢的固定句型）
